titleStmt.title: SII 29.56: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 56. (A.R. No. B. 566 of 1961-62.) KALLUR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into another wall inside the Māratēśvara temple.

It states that when the king Tribhuvanamalla was in his military camp on the bank of the river Narmada his preceptor Vikramāditya-bhattōpādhyāya Sarvakratu Sōmayājin, who is described as a daṇḍanāyaka, received from the king the village Kallūru as dakshiṇā on performing the Paṅchalāñgūla-kratu and he, in his turn, made over the village to the brahamaṇas in the presence of the king.

On the same occasion mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara Chandarasa of the Haihaya family also associated himself in the act of making gift of the village Kallūru to the brahmaṇas and made some other gifts such as 100 mattar of land measured by the rod called the Māṇikēśvaradakōlu, house sites, oil-mills etc, to the god Svayambhū-Maraṭēśvara of Kallūru.

Also, it records a grant of land made on the same occasion by Vāmarasa, the brother-in-law of the royal preceptor to the same deity of Kallūru. The record has profusely eulogized the royal preceptor and mahāmaṇḍaleśvara Chandarasa of the Haihaya family. Also the record mentions god Gavaṟēśvara.
The record is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 21. Dhātu, Chaitra śu. 1, Sunday corresponding to 1096 A.D., February 27. The weekday was Wednesday, f.d.t. 45.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī matribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya rā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re narmmadādēviya daṇḍina naḍevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathā vi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire © svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya
dhyāna dhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhiśīla saṁ
yuktaṁ gurudēva bhaktaṁ kritavidyā vicāraṁ maṁgaḷācāraṁtyaga cintā
maṇi vidvaccūḍāmaṇi ripunikara kṛtānta yaśōdhavaḷita diganta da
ṇḍanāyakaṁ mauḷi māṇikya nīti cāṇākya dvijakuḷa kamaḷanī divā
kara saujanya ratnākara kāvya cāmīkara nikaḷōphaḷatyūrjata nija bhu
ja lālita lakṣmīcāpaḷa haracaraṇa sarasīruha nabhinava ka
lva bhūruha turaṁga vidyānaḷa raṇaraṁga dāvānaḷa rūpādharīkritama
karakētanaṁ vijaya lakṣmī kētanaṁ nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēvara paramārādhyarappa śrīmadayyaṁgaḷu śrīvikra
vikramādityadēva bhaṭṭōpādhyāya sarvvakratu sōmayājiyaru .
śrī maccāḷukya vikrama varṣada 21 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada cai
tra śaddha 1 Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī matribhuvanamalladēvara ka
yyalu śrī narmmadādēviyaddhōdakadalu paṁcalāṁgūla kratu dakṣiṇe
kallūraṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ paḍedu Ā cakravartiya sannidhānadalu svastyanē
ka bhaṁgura taraṁga saṁghāta vībīnicaya lavaṇābdhavaḷa yavaḷaita
vēḷāvanaṁga pāriyātra tanmādhya dēśādhipati sahasrabāhu pratāpa
bhūpa diḷīpanahihaya vaṁśōdbhavanatyugra naraśaradarphaṇa dvajavirāja vīrā
jamāna dāna kānīna mūlapaṟe ghōśaṇa nriparatnabhūṣaṇa satyavikhyāta nī
ti māndhāta budhajana stutya nayyanayyaṇāditya nāmādi samasta praśasti sahi
taṁ ś®(śrī) manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ caṁdarasaruṁ . Āvūraṁ brāhmaṇarige sarvvanamaśya
vāgi kuḍuttuṁ vāḷikāladalu Āvūra śrī svayaṁbhu māraṭēśvaradēva
ra caitrapavitrakaṁ dēvaraṁgabhoga(kkaṁ) nivēdyakkaṁ pāvuḷakkaṁ pūjārigaṁ Inti
nisakkaṁ biṭṭa vṛttiyaydakkaṁ gobbūra dāriyiṁ mūḍalu māṇikēśvarada kōla
lu mattaru nūṟu hiriyakeṟeya baḍagagi kōḍiya keḷage tōṁ
ṭa mattareraḍu dēvariṁ teṁkaṇakēri Ondu gavaṟēśvara dīśānyadalu baṇaṁjeya nivēśa
ṇanavaydu nandādīvigege gāṇaveraḍu Aṁgaḍiyondu . śrī madayyaṁgaḷa ma
yduna vāmarasaṁ tannavṛttiyoḷage khaṁḍyake biṭṭa mattaraydu
kaṁbavaṟunūṟu . © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu nripāṇāṁ . kālē kā
le pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrāṁ nbhūyō bhūyō
yācate rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattā vāyō harēta vasu
ndharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 29.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
